parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (tg_chat_id, tg_username, full_name)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
ON CONFLICT (tg_chat_id) DO UPDATE
   SET tg_username = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.tg_username, clients.tg_username),
       full_name   = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.full_name,   clients.full_name),
       updated_at  = NOW()
RETURNING id, tg_chat_id, tg_username, full_name, phone;

SELECT id, code, title, duration_min, price_rub
  FROM services
 WHERE is_active = TRUE
 ORDER BY sort_order, id;

INSERT INTO conversation_state (tg_chat_id, step, draft, updated_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::jsonb, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (tg_chat_id) DO UPDATE
   SET step = EXCLUDED.step,
       draft = EXCLUDED.draft,
       updated_at = NOW();

WITH upd AS (
  UPDATE clients
     SET full_name = COALESCE($4, full_name),
         phone     = COALESCE($5, phone),
         updated_at = NOW()
   WHERE id = $1
)
INSERT INTO bookings (client_id, service_id, starts_at, ends_at, status)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3::timestamptz, $6::timestamptz, 'confirmed')
RETURNING id;
